summary: Iteration 53: Payment Reminders UI Enhancement - All tests passed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (fixed bulk send email bug). Frontend: All 9 features verified working.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 27 clients with pending payments
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 tested Payment Reminders enhancement. All features working: 7 stat cards, pending/history toggle, client cards with progress bars, quick remind, custom message dialog, urgency filter, search, CSV export, bulk remind. Fixed bug in send_bulk_reminders where send_email was called with 5 args instead of 4.

stats_cards.details: 7 stat cards showing: Total (27), Critical (0), High (13), Medium (0), Low (14), Never Reminded (10), Total Pending (₹1,307,810)

pending_view.details: Client cards with urgency badges (HIGH/LOW), payment progress bars, reminder count badges, Quick Remind + Custom Message buttons

history_view.details: Toggle to History tab shows reminder log table with Date, Client, Email, Pending amount, Count columns. 17 entries found.

quick_remind.details: Click 'Quick Remind' sends default reminder. Toast 'Reminder sent!' appears. Reminder count increments.

custom_message.details: Click 'Custom Message' opens dialog with pre-filled template (219 chars). Shows client name, email, pending amount. Can edit and send.

urgency_filter.details: Dropdown filter by critical/high/medium/low. Clicking stat cards also sets filter.

search.details: Search input filters clients by name/email. Searching 'Jane' shows only Jane Smith.

bulk_remind.details: Button sends reminders to all 3d+ overdue clients. Shows 'Sent X payment reminders' toast.

bug_fixed.issue: send_bulk_reminders was calling send_email() with 5 arguments but it only takes 4
bug_fixed.fix: Changed send_email call to use correct 4 arguments: to_email, subject, title, body_html

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails (no RESEND_API_KEY configured)
